chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-455 of 2016 Cr. Misc. Application No.S-463 of 2016 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 30-05-2019 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, D.P.G..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. It appears that after filing these Criminal Misc. Applications, the applicants have lost interest, therefore, the same are dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
